query:
INSERT INTO capital_stack_templates (template_id, name, description, thesis_alignment, total_layers, target_ltv, target_equity_pct, target_seller_note_pct, is_principal_default, disclaimer, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES
(
  'raleigh_keystone',
  'Project Raleigh Keystone',
  'Principal default template. Near-zero equity structure for Sunbelt essential trade-service acquisitions. Stacks SBA 7(a) + seller note + REAP grant to minimize equity injection. Designed for Continental Keystone thesis targets: HVAC, electrical, janitorial, machine shops in NC, SC, GA, FL, TN, TX, AZ.',
  'continental_keystone',
  5,
  90.00,
  5.00,
  15.00,
  1,
  'Capital stack models are for analytical and illustrative purposes only. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial advisors before executing any transaction. Signal Hunter and Third Signal Labs do not provide legal, tax, or investment advice.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'standard_sba_7a',
  'Standard SBA 7(a)',
  'Conventional SBA 7(a) acquisition structure. 10% buyer equity, 90% SBA-guaranteed loan. Suitable for deals $500K–$5M purchase price with strong cash flow coverage (1.25x+ DSCR). Most common structure for first-time buyers.',
  'generational_transition',
  2,
  90.00,
  10.00,
  0.00,
  0,
  'Capital stack models are for analytical and illustrative purposes only. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial advisors before executing any transaction.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'sba_504_seller',
  'SBA 504 + Seller Note',
  'SBA 504 first mortgage (50%) + certified development company (40%) + seller note (10%) structure. Optimal for real estate-heavy acquisitions where the business owns its building. Seller note replaces buyer equity requirement.',
  'generational_transition',
  3,
  90.00,
  0.00,
  10.00,
  0,
  'Capital stack models are for analytical and illustrative purposes only. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial advisors before executing any transaction.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'independent_sponsor',
  'Independent Sponsor',
  'No-fund independent sponsor structure. Equity from a single LP or family office (60–70%), senior debt (20–30%), management rollover (5–10%). Suitable for $3M–$15M deals where the sponsor sources deal and manages post-close.',
  'continental_keystone',
  3,
  30.00,
  65.00,
  0.00,
  0,
  'Capital stack models are for analytical and illustrative purposes only. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial advisors before executing any transaction.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'veteran_anchored',
  'Veteran-Anchored SBA',
  'SBA 7(a) structure with veteran preference pricing (prime + 2.75% vs prime + 2.75% standard). Stacks with SBA Express for working capital. Eligible for SDVOSB set-aside contracts post-acquisition. Requires veteran ownership of 51%+.',
  'government_contract',
  3,
  90.00,
  10.00,
  5.00,
  0,
  'Capital stack models are for analytical and illustrative purposes only. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial advisors before executing any transaction.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'rollup_addon',
  'Roll-up Add-on',
  'Add-on acquisition structure for a platform company already owned. Senior debt from existing platform credit facility (50–60%), seller note (20–30%), earnout (10–20%). Minimal new equity required. Assumes platform has existing lender relationship.',
  'recurring_revenue',
  4,
  60.00,
  5.00,
  25.00,
  0,
  'Capital stack models are for analytical and illustrative purposes only. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial advisors before executing any transaction.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
),
(
  'reap_enhanced',
  'REAP-Enhanced SBA 7(a)',
  'SBA 7(a) base structure enhanced with USDA REAP grant (up to 50% of eligible cap-ex, max $1M). REAP grant reduces effective equity requirement from 10% to near-zero on eligible rural deals. Requires rural geography and eligible cap-ex (HVAC, fleet electrification, solar).',
  'continental_keystone',
  4,
  90.00,
  2.00,
  8.00,
  0,
  'Capital stack models are for analytical and illustrative purposes only. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial advisors before executing any transaction.',
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000,
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3v1wvYFABP51Dvh.c007ac915537 --database GeCPeFFiEBRZFpk6xckkAz --execute
